title: acer japonicum var. circumlobatum
intro: Acer japonicum var. circumlobatum, also known as the full moon maple or partial moon maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree in the family Sapindaceae, native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acer japonicum var. circumlobatum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves, and can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
